footer.rights: © {year} Jeremy C Kavuncuoglu. All rights reserved.

welcome.name: Jeremy C Kavuncuoglu
welcome.title: Enterprise Application & Cloud Solutions Engineer
welcome.hero_body: I design and deliver secure, scalable Laravel applications and AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise teams. Specializing in Amazon Connect flow architecture, serverless systems, and DevSecOps automation that power reliable, high-performance customer experiences.
welcome.about_body1: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer and DevOps Engineer with expertise in building modern web applications and designing robust cloud infrastructure. My focus is on creating efficient, scalable, and secure solutions.
welcome.about_body2: With experience across the entire development lifecycle, from writing clean backend code to implementing CI/CD pipelines and managing cloud infrastructure, I bring a holistic approach to software development.
welcome.about_feature1_desc: Building end-to-end applications with Laravel, Vue.js, and modern frameworks
welcome.about_feature2_desc: Automating infrastructure with AWS, Docker, and Terraform
welcome.about_feature3_desc: Integrating security into every stage of the development process
welcome.skill_frontend_desc: Crafting user-friendly, performant interfaces with a keen eye for design. I focus on component-driven architecture, accessibility, and smooth UX that feels intuitive across all devices.
welcome.skill_backend_desc: Building robust, maintainable server-side applications and APIs. I prioritise clean architecture, separation of concerns, and performance so systems stay reliable as they scale.
welcome.skill_devops_desc: Designing and automating cloud infrastructure on AWS, containerising workloads with Docker, and shipping code confidently through CI/CD pipelines — targeting zero-downtime, repeatable deployments.
welcome.skill_devsecops_desc: Embedding security at every layer: enforcing HIPAA, HITRUST, and SOC 2 requirements, conducting OWASP-guided code reviews, and applying least-privilege IAM policies to minimise attack surface.
welcome.skill_infrastructure_desc: Ensuring reliability, performance, cost efficiency, and security across database and server layers — through query optimisation, intelligent caching strategies, and proper traffic management.
welcome.skill_tools_desc: Working iteratively with Agile and Scrum, maintaining clean version history with Git, and validating behaviour with automated tests — keeping teams aligned and code quality high throughout the delivery cycle.
welcome.project1_desc: Designed and implemented a scalable cloud infrastructure using AWS services with automated CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code practices.
welcome.project2_desc: Built a modern web application using Laravel and Vue.js with real-time features, authentication, and responsive design.
welcome.project3_desc: Created an automated security scanning pipeline integrating SAST, DAST, and dependency checking into the development workflow.
welcome.contact_body: I'm always interested in new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to connect, feel free to reach out.
welcome.exp1_desc: Led the upgrade of the core application from Laravel 6 / Vue 2 / Bootstrap to Laravel 12 / Vue 3 / TailwindCSS. Managed the AWS cloud environment (EC2, RDS, ECS, S3, Lambda, CloudWatch, IAM, Redshift, ElastiCache) for security and cost efficiency. Built AI infrastructure for real-time phone system analytics via serverless Lambda and optimised the patient contact system achieving a 40% performance improvement. Led offshore development team defining sprint goals and stakeholder expectations.
welcome.exp2_desc: Architected a multi-site lead management system with a custom real-time bidding algorithm distributing leads by demand, preferences and quality, significantly boosting conversion rates. Built custom WordPress plugins and CLI tools automating metadata generation, URL structure improvements and bulk content updates for large-scale SEO across multiple sites.
welcome.exp3_desc: Developed a PHP-based omni-channel operations management platform synchronising real-time inventory, orders and customer data across Amazon, eBay, Shopify and proprietary storefronts. Designed a modular, scalable backend with optimised database queries and built intuitive dashboards to automate order assignment, shipping labels and stock reconciliation.
welcome.exp4_desc: Built a web-based Laravel product management system with an intuitive UI for efficient inventory tracking and organisation. Introduced Agile methodologies to the development team and established a standardised local Docker development environment, significantly improving team consistency and productivity.
welcome.blog_empty: No posts available yet. Check back soon.
